executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with problem statement, actors, outcome contract, 6 use cases, 10 business scenarios, 7 requirements with Gherkin, and success metrics. Identified 4 missing YAML config entries and confirmed Discord entry exists but is unwired.

Created design.md covering registration pattern, per-connector config wiring (Discord, Twitter, Weather, Gov Alerts, Financial Markets), YAML config blocks, env var mapping, config generation script changes, helper functions, and testing strategy. All 5 connectors follow existing 9-connector pattern exactly.
Created scopes.md with 1 scope (wire all 5 connectors — imports, registration, YAML config, config.sh, health endpoint). Created report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

Wired all 5 connectors: added imports, instantiation, registration, and auto-start blocks in cmd/core/main.go. Added 4 YAML config blocks to config/smackerel.yaml. Extended scripts/commands/config.sh with yaml_get_json helper and env var extraction for all 5 connectors. Added parseJSONArray, parseJSONObject, parseFloatEnv helper functions. Build succeeds, all unit tests pass.

Manual cross-check verified spec implementation files exist on disk: cmd/core/connectors.go (378 lines, 15 connector imports/registrations/auto-start blocks), cmd/core/helpers.go (parseJSONArray/parseJSONObject/parseFloatEnv), config/smackerel.yaml (5 connector blocks: discord/twitter/weather/gov-alerts/financial-markets), scripts/commands/config.sh (yaml_get_json helper + env extractions for all 5). go test passes for discord/twitter/weather/alerts/markets packages.

cross_spec_trace_guard_remediation_via_per_class_fixes (Iter 9): Replaced 5 wildcard *_test.go paths with concrete files (internal/connector/discord/discord_test.go, twitter/twitter_test.go, weather/weather_test.go, alerts/alerts_test.go, markets/markets_test.go) in scopes.md Test Plan; tagged DoD bullets for SCN-019-002, SCN-019-003 with 'Scenario SCN-019-NNN (title):' prefix; added concrete-path mentions in report.md scenario-coverage table. trace-guard PASSED (0 warnings).

OPS-002 G088 recert (no-source reconstruction). Reconstructed original certification moment from git: commit e2dcb391 (2026-04-10T18:33:53Z) in_progress->done ('delivery-lockdown: certify specs 019, 021, 023 done'); status held done thereafter. Reviewed 12 post-cert planning edits to THIS spec, all category (b) incidental reconciliation: 7f6f1834 (2026-04-10 design.md+scopes.md sweep); 52d9a4ce (2026-04-11 design.md 1-line); 80bda251 (2026-04-12 scopes.md scope-status labels 'Planning complete'/'[x] In Progress'->Done); ee6b7ca0 (2026-04-14 spec.md health-endpoint connector count 14->15 + balanced design/scopes rewording, DoD stays [x]); 9e879807 (2026-04-15 design.md); 4626c2a5 (2026-04-17 spec.md/scopes.md balanced); 344338e9 (2026-04-22 design.md+scopes.md); 466d2f1c (2026-04-22 scopes.md 4-line); c363141c (2026-04-24 scopes.md evidence reconcile, balanced); 6860f5b8 (2026-05-08 DoD-trace-prefix + scenario-manifest + Test Plan paths); d203d0b9 (2026-05-24 +2-line SCN-019-004/005 G068 fidelity bullets); 19b31c0a (2026-05-28 spec.md Status banner->Done). No post-promotion requirement/scenario/DoD semantic change; current scopes.md all-Done with 0 unchecked DoD; implementation unchanged. certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z for Gate G088.

DV-019-003 certification-taxonomy reconciliation (stochastic-quality-sweep Round 4). Migrated the legacy combined 'improve' entry in certification.certifiedCompletedPhases to its post-split components 'simplify' + 'gaps' (Gate G022 specialist-phase split). Truthful basis: the legacy 'improve' work for THIS spec genuinely covered BOTH dimensions. Gap-closure is evidenced by report.md Improvement Sweep R27 (IMP-019-R27-001 Gov Alerts source_earthquake + IMP-019-R27-002 Weather enable_alerts/forecast_days/precision 'entirely missing from SST pipeline', both Fixed) and Improvement Sweep R28 (IMP-019-R28-001 Financial Markets fred_enabled + IMP-019-R28-002 fred_series 'entirely missing from SST pipeline', both Fixed), plus Test Sweep 2026-04-12 missing-test additions (TestAllConnectorsRegistered, test_connector_wiring.sh, TestDuplicateRegistrationRejected). Simplification/structure review is evidenced by the 2026-04-21 Improvement Sweep full-implementation review (registration-pattern consistency, BUG-004 connectors.go/services.go/helpers.go/shutdown.go split, dead-helper identification). Original certification basis preserved: commit e2dcb391 (2026-04-10) 'delivery-lockdown: certify specs 019, 021, 023 done' is unchanged; this is metadata reconciliation, not re-validation, so the Gate G088 grandfather basis holds. No protected artifact (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md) edited. Repo-wide legacy-taxonomy drift also affects siblings 021 (records 'simplify' only) and 023 (records 'gaps' only) from the same cert commit e2dcb391 — flagged for a dedicated migration pass, not fixed here (scope discipline).

Stochastic-quality-sweep Round 28 regression probe. Finding REG-019-001: test baseline drift in tests/integration/test_connector_wiring.sh — original spec 019 contract 'all 5 default to enabled: false' was superseded by commit 4a90ec5e 'feat(connectors): enable rss, weather, gov-alerts (Bucket A)' which intentionally enabled weather and gov-alerts for active use. Fixed test to expect intentional state (weather=true, gov-alerts=true). All 23 connector packages pass (cmd/core 1.6s, connector supervisor 51.9s, all 5 wired connectors ok). No code regressions, coverage decreases, or cross-spec conflicts. Baseline verification: 17 registrations, all 5 imports present, helper functions at lines 10/15, 5 YAML blocks at lines 517/531/541/560/600, 46 env vars generated. artifact-lint PASSED.

Stochastic-quality-sweep Round 14 chaos probe (chaos-hardening mode, parent-expanded child mode — nested runSubagent unavailable). Probed the connector-wiring resilience surface for race conditions, edge cases, and failure-mode handling across 7 dimensions; all verified resilient by design, no new actionable finding. (1) NATS-down nil-deref on the Weather/Gov-Alerts svc.nc.Publish method-value captures — CLOSED: cmd/core/services.go:149 connects NATS fail-loud and aborts startup before registerConnectors runs, so svc.nc is guaranteed non-nil. (2) Connector registration failure — CLOSED: fail-loud, registry.Register error returns from registerConnectors and cmd/core/main.go:122 aborts; TestDuplicateRegistrationRejected PASS. (3) Individual connector Connect() failure — CLOSED: graceful Warn+continue per block (intended degradation), siblings unaffected. (4) Connector sync-loop panic — CLOSED: supervisor runWithRecovery (internal/connector/supervisor.go:163) recovers panics with a circuit breaker. (5) Malformed-config parse — CLOSED: parseJSONArrayVal (cmd/core/helpers.go:15) returns nil + slog.Warn (SEC-019-001 fixed); dead fail-soft helpers removed by BUG-020-003. (6) Weather publisher ordering (StartConnector before SetAlertPublisher) — LOW/non-issue: StartConnector schedules a panic-recovered goroutine respecting SyncSchedule; publisher set on immediately-following lines. (7) Shutdown drain — CLOSED: supervisor StopAll bounded 10s WaitGroup drain before NATS/DB close. Evidence: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'TestAllConnectorsRegistered|TestDuplicateRegistrationRejected|TestConnectorStartupGate|TestHealthHandler_ConnectorHealth' --verbose -> all 5 PASS (TestConnectorStartupGate_BooleanIsSoleLoadBearingSignal, TestConnectorStartupGate_AdversarialReintroduction, TestAllConnectorsRegistered, TestDuplicateRegistrationRejected, TestHealthHandler_ConnectorHealth), cmd/core ok 0.691s, internal/api ok 0.461s, WRAPPER_EXIT=0. No protected artifact (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md) edited; spec status remains done.
